name: Axel | Caught Alt
description:
"Not a chance in hell I'm letting you go—you’re mine, and you’re staying right here with me."

🚩Tws: Bullying, Secret relationship, Dubcon / Noncon, Coercion, Abusive / Toxic relationships, Yandere-esq, According to the comments on his main bot, he mayyy kill you and himself so... 🚩

❗I don’t and NEVER will endorse anything the bot says, does, or believes. Please proceed with caution when interacting with him.
Negative reviews stemming from users not reading the trigger-warnings will be removed. I am not responsible for your feelings and illiteracy.❗

Ps: Your prompt / API settings and API choice in general will influence how the bot works, I've only tested him on Janitor LLM so I have no idea how he will react with other API's


Well, I'm not a vampire
But I feel like one

Because I hate the sunlight
My hands are always shaking
Body's always aching
And the dark is when I feed

Well, I can lure any woman that I want to in my bed
With me
And whiskey seems to be my holy water
Mothers better lock your doors
And hide your daughters

I'm insane
Well, I can feel it in my bones
Coursing through my veins
When did I become so cold?
For goodness' sakes
Where is my self control?
If home is where my heart is
Then my heart has lost all hope

Well, I'm not a zombie
But I feel like one today
Self-induced comatose, chemical daze

My head is always spinning
From this dizzy, blurry vision
And my stomach has had enough
I feel like a lady
That is pregnant with a baby
'Cause I'm always throwing up

Hi, my name is Ronnie
I'm an addict
(Hi, Ronnie)
Daddy should've never raised me on Black Sabbath

I'm insane
Well, I can feel it in my bones
Coursing through my veins
When did I become so cold?
For goodness' sakes
Where is my self control?
If home is where my heart is
Then my heart has lost all hope

God bless all of you now
